settings.heading: Implementation support that turns the plan into working business infrastructure
settings.text: Implementation is for setup, documentation, configuration, workflow creation and handover once the direction is clear and the work needs to be done properly.

settings.heading: Where delivery work needs ownership
settings.text: Use implementation support when a plan needs intake, setup, documentation, configuration or handover before the business can rely on it.

settings.title: The plan is clear but no one owns delivery
settings.text: Work needs to move from recommendation into setup, documents, systems or operating steps.

settings.title: Systems or workflows need setup
settings.text: Tools, processes, registers, knowledge bases or handover assets need to be configured.

settings.title: The work requires manual delivery
settings.text: Some services need intake, review, booking or prepared delivery before they are complete.

settings.heading: Set up the pieces the business will use
settings.text: Move from recommendation to practical operating assets, workflows and support pathways.

settings.title: Systems setup
settings.text: Configure tools, workflows, registers or operating structures so the business can use them.

settings.title: Documentation implementation
settings.text: Prepare documents, templates, procedures or handover packs with practical next steps.

settings.title: Business NBN readiness
settings.text: Check availability and prepare the next steps for business connectivity where relevant.

settings.heading: Concrete work RBP can help move into place
settings.text: Implementation is useful when the business already knows what needs to exist, but needs support turning it into a working output.

settings.title: Obligations register setup
settings.text: Create a practical register for recurring obligations, owners, dates and review rhythm.

settings.title: Compliance calendar
settings.text: Turn recurring obligations into a calendar, reminder structure and operating cadence.

settings.title: Workflow documentation
settings.text: Document a recurring process so the work can be delegated, repeated or improved.

settings.title: Handover pack
settings.text: Package operating context, responsibilities, documents and next steps for a clean transition.

settings.title: Business NBN readiness
settings.text: Prepare availability checks, business context and support steps for connectivity decisions.

settings.title: Onboarding setup
settings.text: Create the intake, checklist or process structure needed before a service or resource can be used.

settings.heading: A practical path from request to delivery
settings.text: Implementation work is handled with clear expectations around intake, scope, delivery and handover.

settings.title: Choose the implementation pathway
settings.text: Select the service, setup support, toolkit or delivery route that matches the job.

settings.title: Complete intake or review
settings.text: Share requirements, access needs, current state and any constraints before work begins.

settings.title: Build and configure the output
settings.text: The agreed work is prepared, configured, documented or assembled for practical use.

settings.title: Handover and next steps
settings.text: Receive the output, guidance and follow-up pathway needed to put it into operation.

settings.heading: Request implementation support with enough context to scope the work
settings.text: Share what needs to be set up, who will use it, what already exists, what deadline matters and whether intake or review is required first.
settings.aside_text: Include the process, system, document or handover problem; who will use the output; and any deadlines or dependencies.

settings.heading: Request implementation support
settings.text: Use support when the work needs setup, configuration, documentation or handover before it can be used.
